mapper.insert:
insert into exam_question_course (question_id, course_id, stage_name, created_at) values
(#{item.questionId}, #{item.courseId}, #{item.stageName}, #{item.createdAt})
mapper.select: select question_id, course_id, stage_name, created_at from exam_question_course where question_id = #{questionId} order by course_id asc, stage_name asc
